text.title: Market Sizing with AI Research Tools Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end with explicit decision-gates.

step.name: define-market
step.action: Write market_definition (≥20 chars) — what's in/out, geo, year.

step.name: top-down
step.action: Find total market size × addressable share; cite ≥2 sources.

step.name: bottom-up
step.action: Estimate users × ARPU × addressable fraction; cite ≥2 sources.

step.name: value-theory
step.action: Estimate $ value per user × capture rate × user count.

step.name: reconcile
step.action: Compare spread; if >2x write reconciliation explaining why.
step.decision-gate: If reconciliation < 40 chars and spread > 2x, halt + re-research.
